title: Chart support
author: Toub
body: Is it possible to read or write charts with exceljs?

comments.author: lcotonea
comments.body: Another nodejs library allow to do that : https://www.npmjs.com/package/xlsx-chart but it seems there's no way to merge workbook.

comments.author: Toub
comments.body:
We should get inspiration here: https://github.com/optilude/xlsx-template

And also see this discussion here: https://github.com/SheetJS/js-xlsx/issues/111

comments.author: nowherenearithaca
comments.body: I'm guessing this is not simple :)

comments.author: felix25
comments.body: there is already the integration for excelljs??

comments.author: akarait-boobalan
comments.body:
> Is it possible to read or write charts with exceljs?

How to download excel table and chart in same excel. Anyone can you give me some references?
